issue.title: Gratuitous UB via manifestly constant-evaluated contexts in signal handlers

discussion.p:
paragraph 2 specifies that a signal handler invocation has undefined behaviour if it includes an evaluation that is not signal-safe.
Such an included evaluation (consistent with CWG's understanding; see CWG 3162) may occur within a manifestly constant-evaluated context, in which case, the specified undefined behaviour is gratuitous.
